roles.name: System Administrator
roles.description: Manages system configuration, users, permissions. Has full system access.

roles.name: Facility Administrator
roles.description: Manages facility, oversees operations. Has facility-wide access.

roles.name: Survey Administrator
roles.description: Creates/manages surveys, views all results. Has survey builder and view all surveys access.

roles.name: Director of Health Services / DON
roles.description: Clinical oversight, manages deficiencies, POCs. Has survey taking, deficiency, and POC access.

roles.name: Compliance Officer
roles.description: Manages compliance, POCs, remediation. Has compliance, deficiency, and POC access.

roles.name: Survey Coordinator
roles.description: Prepares for surveys, manages survey documentation. Has survey preparation and document access.

roles.name: Clinical Staff
roles.description: Nurses, aides - documentation. Limited access - view assigned surveys, upload documents.

roles.name: Viewer
roles.description: External consultants, corporate oversight. Read-only access.
